headline: Ripple vs SWIFT vs Visa: The Quiet Battle Over Cross-Border Payments
summary: For about 50 years, sending money across borders has meant going through SWIFT—the network behind roughly 11,500 banks. It was never fast and it was never cheap, but for moving trillions of dollars between countries every year, it was the only game in town.
